## Problem

What user or platform problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Capability

Describe the proposed feature.

## Platform Area

- Hardware
- Runtime
- MCP tools
- Example workflows
- Docs
- Website

## Why It Fits Pclika

Explain how it fits the platform model and why it should be reusable.

## Suggested First Example

If implemented, what would the first example or demo look like?
